name: Chase Sapphire Preferred
rewardsSummary: 3x on dining, 2x on travel, 1x on everything else.
aiReasoning: This card is ideal for your travel and dining spending habits, and the 60,000 point welcome bonus enhances its appeal. However, your credit score is just below the threshold for excellent approval likelihood.

name: American Express Gold Card
rewardsSummary: 4x at restaurants, 4x at US supermarkets (up to $25k/yr), 3x on flights, 1x on other.
aiReasoning: With high rewards on dining and grocery spending, this card suits your lifestyle, and the annual credits can offset the fee. Your strong credit score supports good approval odds.

rewardsSummary: 5% on Chase travel, 3% on dining and drugstores, 1.5% on all other purchases.

name: Citi Double Cash Card
rewardsSummary: 2% cash back on all purchases (1% when you buy + 1% when you pay).

highlights: Flat 2% on everything — no category tracking needed
0% intro APR on balance transfers for 18 months

rewardsSummary: Unlimited 2% cash rewards on all purchases.

name: Chase Sapphire Reserve

name: The Platinum Card from American Express

name: Blue Cash Preferred Card from American Express

name: Citi Simplicity Card
rewardsSummary: No rewards — designed for balance transfers and debt payoff.
